Hero.title: Corporate stock solutions are easier with Leadnova
Hero.description: Start managing your warehouse instantly with our smart, secure, and multi-user system. Track stock movements, monitor critical levels.

Dashboard.status: Your warehouse is safe. You can manage your transactions below. Your system is now at full capacity and optimized.
Dashboard.deadStockDesc: {count} products are locking {value} TL of capital in total.
Dashboard.monthlyChampionDesc: {name} is at the top with {qty} movements this month.
Dashboard.noCompanyFound: No authorized company account defined for this email address. Please contact your system administrator.
Dashboard.locationSystemDesc: Allows you to track product locations (Shelf, Row, etc.) within the warehouse.
Dashboard.importResult: {total} rows read, {success} products imported, {skipped} invalid rows skipped.
Dashboard.importNoData: No valid data found to import.
Dashboard.addProductDesc: Quickly add a new product or upload an Excel list.
Dashboard.confirmDeleteTitle: Are you sure you want to delete this product?
Dashboard.confirmDeleteDesc: This action cannot be undone and all stock history will be deleted.
